form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 3/4 on April 2 over 380m at this track behind I'm Free beaten 6 lengths (22.09). Fought on last time. Has the ability and right in the mix.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made contact with the inside running rail rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 6 lengths at this track over 380m (21.76) beating Aston Kinnie in Grade 3/4 on March 31. Has a solid record from this draw including six wins. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 380m in 21.64 last start, beating Moonshine Magic. Has run hot time here with a 21.54 PB at the distance. Key chance.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 380m at this track. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth over 380m at this track, beaten 4.5 lengths (22.02) behind Emgrand Drive in a OPEN on March 31. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (29.35) in a Grade 5/6, finishing a 10 length second. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Key chance and should go close.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing fifth (22.69) at this track. Has a wide draw to navigate and will need a little luck to feature.
